News

Professor Todd Walter on CARNATIONS Waypoint Podcast Episode 1

June 03, 2026

CARNATIONS Waypoint Podcast interviews Professor Todd Walter to explore the science and innovation behind modern navigation systems.

GPS Lab at ION Pacific PNT 2026

April 17, 2026

Sherman Lo, Todd Walter, Juan Blanch, Frank Lai, Rebecca Wang, Argyris Kriezis, and Jade Babcock-Chi presented papers at ION Pacific PNT in Honolulu, HI.

Jason Wins RTCA Jackson Award

March 16, 2026

Jason Anderson wins RTCA's William E. Jackson Award for his dissertation: “Designing Cryptography Systems for GNSS Data and Ranging Authentication.”

GPS Lab Ski Trip 2026

March 03, 2026

The GPS Lab went on a group trip to Palisades Tahoe. Lots of skiing and sun!

Frank Lai PhD Defense

February 27, 2026

Yu-Fang (Frank) Lai will be defending his thesis: “Global Integrity Monitoring for Precise Satellite Navigation.”

GPS Lab Attends ION ITM/PTTI 2026

January 30, 2026

Dr. Juan Blanch and Dr. Sherman Lo presented research on GNSS integrity monitoring with ARAIM and aviation spoofing incidents with ADS-B at the ION ITM conference.

GPS Lab Attends ION GNSS+ 2025

September 15, 2025

Seven GPS Lab members presented research focusing on GNSS integrity and interference monitoring at the ION GNSS+ conference.

Jason Wins ION Parkinson Award

September 12, 2025

Jason Anderson wins ION's Bradford W. Parkinson Award for his thesis: “Designing Cryptography Systems for GNSS Data and Ranging Authentication.”
